overall.description: First-person exploration through a gothic castle interior, ascending grand staircases and entering the ornate Prefects' Bathroom with golden serpent statues and a central pool. Game engine footage from Hogwarts Legacy featuring detailed medieval architecture and atmospheric candlelight.

scene_state.functional_zone: castle antechamber with fireplace and gothic windows

agents.ego_description: moving through the dimly lit room toward the exit door

entered.detail: large stone fireplace with burning fire on the right side of the room
tall arched window with diamond-patterned glass showing night sky
heavy wooden door with iron studs serving as the room exit
large black iron cauldron near the fireplace

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a dimly lit castle antechamber with a stone fireplace to the right and gothic windows to the left. The camera moves steadily forward across the marble floor toward a heavy wooden door at the far end of the room.

events.description: passing through the wooden door into the enclosed stairwell
beginning to ascend the grand staircase
approaching brighter upper landing with visible chandelier

agents.ego_description: climbing the grand staircase past framed portraits on the walls

entered.detail: wide wooden staircase with carved railings ascending to upper floors
collection of framed portraits lining the left wall
ornate wall-mounted lanterns providing warm illumination
large hanging chandelier visible at the top of the stairs

segments.scene_description: The camera passes through the door into a narrow enclosed stairwell featuring a grand wooden staircase. It ascends past walls adorned with portrait galleries and illuminated by wall sconces, approaching a brighter upper landing with a visible chandelier.

scene_state.functional_zone: spiral staircase with central wooden statue

events.description: transitioning from straight stairs to spiral staircase section
turning right to follow the spiral of the staircase

agents.ego_description: ascending the spiral staircase around the central wooden statue

entered.detail: winding wooden staircase curving around a central column
tall carved wooden statue of a robed figure at the center of the spiral
elaborate hanging light fixture with multiple candles
dark wood paneling covering the walls

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a spiral staircase section winding around a central wooden statue. It continues ascending the wooden steps, passing ornate chandeliers and panelled walls as it curves upward.

scene_state.functional_zone: circular antechamber with ornate bathroom door

events.description: exiting spiral staircase into circular antechamber
approaching the large ornate door to the bathroom

agents.ego_description: crossing the circular room toward the ornate bathroom entrance

entered.detail: round antechamber with ornate circular rug on the floor
tall carved wooden door with serpent-shaped bronze handles
intricate patterned rug covering the center of the floor
large circular chandelier hanging from the ceiling

segments.scene_description: The camera exits the spiral stairs into a circular antechamber featuring a patterned rug and grand chandelier. It moves forward toward a large ornate wooden door with serpent handles that leads to the bathroom.

scene_state.functional_zone: ornate bathroom with central pool and serpent statues

events.description: opening the door and entering the Prefects' Bathroom
turning left to explore the side of the bathroom with sinks

agents.ego_description: entering the bathroom and walking along the poolside to examine the serpent statues and fixtures

entered.detail: large ornate bathroom with high ceilings and elaborate copper decorations
long rectangular pool of dark water running the length of the room
elaborate golden serpent statues forming archways along the poolside
black and white diamond-patterned tile flooring
large golden shell-shaped sink with pearl-like fixture

segments.scene_description: The camera enters the magnificent Prefects' Bathroom, revealing a long central pool flanked by golden serpent archways and checkered tile floors. It turns left to explore the side area, showcasing shell-shaped sinks and ornate copper decorations along the walls.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a dimly lit castle antechamber through a series of ascending staircases and into a magnificent, ornate bathroom. It begins by gliding across a marble floor past a stone fireplace and gothic windows, moving steadily toward a heavy wooden door. As the camera passes through the threshold, it ascends a grand wooden staircase lined with portrait galleries and wall sconces before winding upward through a spiral section centered around a wooden statue. The scene then opens into a circular antechamber with a patterned rug and a grand chandelier, leading the camera toward a large door with serpent handles. Finally, the view expands into the Prefects' Bathroom, revealing a long central pool flanked by golden serpent archways and checkered tiles before turning to showcase shell-shaped sinks and copper decorations.
